{{Quote|Thank the Force you've come. This place is...uhh...aahhgg!!|Blenjeel shipwreck survivor, just before being eaten by a sand burrower.|<ref name="Jedi Academy" />}}
This [[Color/Legends|fair]]-skinned '''Human male''' with dirty-blond [[Hair/Legends|hair]] served on a [[Crashed merchant vessel|merchant vessel]]<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]<ref name="Date" /> and survived a crash in the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. The incident occurred when the vessel crossed paths with an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] and was [[Attack on the merchant ship|shot down]] on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Blenjeel]]. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|Jedi Apprentice]] [[Jaden Korr]] was [[Mission to Blenjeel|sent]] by the [[New Jedi Order]] to [[Mission to Blenjeel|rescue]] the crew of the downed [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. However, by the time he arrived, he found that the blond Human [[Gender/Legends|man]] was the lone survivor. Shortly before Korr could rescue him, the man was eaten by a native creature known as a [[sand burrower]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Behind the scenes==
The shipwreck survivor first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' released in [[2003]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
